'''modabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stableless|stableless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stableless|stableless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| modabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:modabithi|modabithi]] || [[word:modabiji|modabiji]] || [[word:modabishi|modabishi]] || [[word:modabiki|modabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:modabuthuthu|modabuthuthu]] || [[word:modabujuju|modabujuju]] || [[word:modabushushu|modabushushu]] || [[word:modabukuku|modabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:modabuthu|modabuthu]] || [[word:modabuju|modabuju]] || [[word:modabushu|modabushu]] || [[word:modabuku|modabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:modabufthuf|modabufthuf]] || [[word:modabufjuf|modabufjuf]] || [[word:modabufshuf|modabufshuf]] || [[word:modabufkuf|modabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:modabethe|modabethe]] || [[word:modabeje|modabeje]] || [[word:modabeshe|modabeshe]] || [[word:modabeke|modabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:modabothotho|modabothotho]] || [[word:modabojojo|modabojojo]] || [[word:modaboshosho|modaboshosho]] || [[word:modabokoko|modabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:modabotho|modabotho]] || [[word:modabojo|modabojo]] || [[word:modabosho|modabosho]] || [[word:modaboko|modaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:modabofthof|modabofthof]] || [[word:modabofjof|modabofjof]] || [[word:modabofshof|modabofshof]] || [[word:modabofkof|modabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:modabÃŸfthÃŸf|modabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfjÃŸf|modabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfshÃŸf|modabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfkÃŸf|modabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:modabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|modabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|modabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|modabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|modabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:modabÃŸfthÃŸf|modabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfjÃŸf|modabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfshÃŸf|modabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfkÃŸf|modabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:modabÃŸfthÃŸf|modabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfjÃŸf|modabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfshÃŸf|modabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:modabÃŸfkÃŸf|modabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:modabÃḊthÃḊ|modabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:modabÃḊjÃḊ|modabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:modabÃḊshÃḊ|modabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:modabÃḊkÃḊ|modabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:modabathatha|modabathatha]] || [[word:modabajaja|modabajaja]] || [[word:modabashasha|modabashasha]] || [[word:modabakaka|modabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:modabatha|modabatha]] || [[word:modabaja|modabaja]] || [[word:modabasha|modabasha]] || [[word:modabaka|modabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:modabafthaf|modabafthaf]] || [[word:modabafjaf|modabafjaf]] || [[word:modabafshaf|modabafshaf]] || [[word:modabafkaf|modabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:modabasha|modabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:modabshÃḋsha|modabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modabrosha|modabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modabmusha|modabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:modabyasha|modabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodabnkshÃḋsha|gomodabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodabnkrosha|gomodabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodabnkmusha|gomodabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodabnkyasha|gomodabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:modadabasha|modadabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modadabshÃḋsha|modadabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modadabrosha|modadabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modadabmusha|modadabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modadabyasha|modadabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodadabnkshÃḋsha|gomodadabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodadabnkrosha|gomodadabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodadabnkmusha|gomodadabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodadabnkyasha|gomodadabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:medÃḊbasha|medÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:medÃḊbshÃḋsha|medÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:medÃḊbrosha|medÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:medÃḊbmusha|medÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:medÃḊbyasha|medÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomedÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gomedÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomedÃḊbnkrosha|gomedÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomedÃḊbnkmusha|gomedÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomedÃḊbnkyasha|gomedÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:modfabasha|modfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:modfabshÃḋsha|modfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:modfabrosha|modfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:modfabmusha|modfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:modfabyasha|modfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomodfabnkshÃḋsha|gomodfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomodfabnkrosha|gomodfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomodfabnkmusha|gomodfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomodfabnkyasha|gomodfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
